billing.trustFlexible: Upgrade or downgrade anytime; changes apply next billing cycle
billing.trustBilling: Transparent billing with clear prices and cycles
billing.trustSecurity: Your data is protected in transit and at rest
billing.summaryStarter: Validate ideas quickly and move from concept to first draft with less friction.
billing.summaryCreator: Built for consistent publishing so your workflow stays uninterrupted.
billing.metricWritingOutcome: Sustain drafting from outline to polished chapters
billing.metricAgentRunsOutcome: Handle outlining, rewrites, polishing, and revisions
billing.metricProjectsOutcome: Run multiple books without frequent archiving
billing.metricContextOutcome: Keeps long-form plot and character context intact
billing.metricExportOutcome: Deliver directly to editors, teams, or clients
billing.metricWritingHelper: Estimated sustainable output based on your publishing pace
billing.metricAgentRunsHelper: For outlining, rewrites, structural edits, and other deep tasks
billing.metricProjectsHelper: Run multiple genres or client projects in parallel
billing.metricContextHelper: Larger context is better for long-form continuity edits
billing.metricExportHelper: Export directly for editors, platforms, or clients
billing.metricMaterialUploadsOutcome: Keep feeding source material without breaking writing flow
billing.metricMaterialDecompositionsOutcome: Decompose reference materials each month and extract structured notes fast
billing.metricCustomSkillsOutcome: Capture team workflows and reuse them in daily writing
billing.metricInspirationCopiesOutcome: Clone proven templates into projects for faster starts
billing.metricPriorityQueueOutcome: Start tasks faster during peak usage windows

inspiration.title: Creative Inspiration
inspiration.novelPlaceholder: Enter your creative idea, e.g., A programmer travels to ancient times and discovers his coding ability becomes cultivation...
inspiration.shortPlaceholder: Describe your story idea, e.g., Late night at a convenience store, an old man comes every night to buy the same discontinued candy...
inspiration.screenplayPlaceholder: Tell me what you want to shoot, e.g., A CEO gets rejected at a matchmaking corner for low income, decides to hide identity to pursue true love...
inspiration.novelDesc: AI will help you conceptualize story framework, build world and characters based on your inspiration
inspiration.shortDesc: AI will help you refine story structure, making the short story more compelling
inspiration.screenplayDesc: AI will help you design episode plots, dialogue and twists, making the script more engaging

inspirations.emptyHint: No picks right now. Explore the inspiration library for ideas.

novel.name: Long-form Novel
novel.description: Build expansive world-building systems and develop compelling character arcs. Perfect for serialized novels over 50,000 words.

short.name: Short Story
short.description: Craft complete narratives with precision and emotional resonance. Ideal for standalone stories of 5,000-20,000 words.

screenplay.name: Screenplay
screenplay.description: Design episode plots and scene dialogue for fast-paced mini-dramas. Perfect for short video scripts and micro-dramas.

common.slogan: Let AI be your creative partner

outstandingTasks.allClearHint: No pending tasks at the moment

wordCount.title: Word Count
wordCount.trendDescription: Track your daily, weekly, and monthly writing progress. Click on the time range buttons to switch views.

tips.title: Streak Tips
tips.daily: Write at least 10 words daily to maintain your streak.
tips.consistency: Consistency is more important than volume. Even small progress counts.
tips.recovery: Missed a day? Use a streak recovery to keep your streak alive.

aiUsage.title: AI Collaboration

aiUsage.askForHelpDesc: Get suggestions for your writing project

tips.title: AI Usage Tips
tips.efficiency: Use AI for brainstorming, outlining, and editing to maximize efficiency.
tips.iterative: Iterative refinement yields better results than single-shot generation.
tips.context: Provide context from your story for more relevant AI suggestions.

projectType.title: Choose what you want to write
projectType.description: Novel, short story, and screenplay each follow a different creation path. Start with the closest fit.
